attacking_style: Forced into early, long-range attacks (2+ km out) due to recognized sprint limitations. Lacks the power reserve to sustain solo efforts against organized finishers with leadouts.
team_tactics: Operates with significant personal autonomy; demonstrated willingness to prioritize individual ambitions (KOM hunting) even when conflicting with team objectives (teammate holding jersey).
terrain_preference: Shows exceptional recovery capacity on undulating terrain where bridging efforts are rewarded. KOM-classified climbs suit opportunistic breakaway tactics, though lacks explosive power for steep sustained gradients.
vulnerability: Predictably absorbed in final kilometers when attempting solo efforts. Cannot compete in organized sprint finishes. Power-to-weight appears insufficient to hold off chasers with superior peak wattage.
key_patterns: Attacks prematurely from 2+ km out due to sprint weakness, consistently caught (2 observations)
Exceptional bridging/recovery ability: closed 11km gap after being dropped at Tour de Suisse
Prioritizes personal objectives over team strategy when opportunity arises (KOM hunting over support)
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows strong recovery capacity (2022 Tour de Suisse bridging) but continues struggling with same tactical vulnerabilities seen in 2021 (premature attacks, insufficient finishing power)
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
